arts.ttl: Marotta addresses match suspension following Bove’s collapse
arts.sum: Following the alarming incident during the Fiorentina-Inter match, where Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove collapsed on the field, Inter Milan’s CEO Beppe Marotta spoke to Sky Sport about the situation. He expressed the solidarity of the football community in light of the medical emergency that unfolded. “I spoke with Pradé a little while ago,” Marotta stated. “I am here to express the closeness of Inter and the world of football. We are a community; when situations like this happen, all players and the referee are involved. arts.ttl: Paulo Dybala told Cristiano Ronaldo that he hated him to his face
arts.sum: A rgentine football star Paulo Dybala, known for his extraordinary talent and versatility on the field, has experienced the rare privilege of playing alongside both Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo . Dybala admitted that he once "hated" the Portuguese star - a sentiment rooted in the fierce rivalry between Messi and Ronaldo, particularly in Argentina.
